description: CompositionRed V-neck striped t-shirt  in 100% cotton with mickey print near the chestFittingRegularWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis cotton t-shirt from disney with an over lapping neckline and  mickey print is the best way to give a burst of summer time energy to your tot. Team this ultra comfy tee with casual lowers for a great day out with your little one. Add on a pair of comfortable footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little boy into a prince.
